examples: Viscerosomatic reflex hypothesis describes that visceral afferent fibers cause reflex somatic problems.
Think of efferent coupling as the inverse of afferent coupling.
Afferent coupling is harder to determine and much more valuable.
The unpleasant feedback from exercising, such as difficulty breathing, sweating or stiff muscles, is transferred to the brain using the afferent, or sensory, nervous system.
